title: Copper & Reinforcements
description: A mod adding new options for early-game tools & armor.
body:
This mod adds multiple options for early-game equipment.

## Armor

This mod adds both a unique copper armor set, as well as providing means of crafting the chainmail armor set. These provide a decision between strength (copper) or durability (chainmail).

## Tools

This mod adds the ability to reinforce stone tools using copper, providing them with more durability (and enchantability!).
